narrative:
Precinct Knox (precinct in Guernsey County) has 339 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
